message:
feat(cli): add signature management subcommand

Implements `pt signature` CLI commands for managing user-defined
process supervisor signatures:

- `list` - Show built-in and user signatures with pattern info
- `show <name>` - Display detailed signature definition
- `add` - Add new user signature with wizard or flags
- `remove <name>` - Remove user signature
- `test <pid>` - Test signature matching against a process
- `validate` - Check signature JSON for syntax errors
- `export` - Export signatures for sharing

User signatures stored at ~/.config/process_triage/signatures.json
and merged with built-in signatures at runtime.

Part of beads issue ed3.1 (user signature customization).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
